name: Tempus Resources Limited
description: Tempus Resources Limited is an Australian-based mineral exploration company focused on the discovery and development of high-grade gold and base metal projects. The company has historically held significant interests in exploration assets across Canada and Ecuador, including the Blackdome-Elizabeth Gold Project in British Columbia. Tempus Resources is committed to advancing its portfolio through systematic exploration programs, aiming to unlock value for shareholders by identifying and developing mineral resources in prospective geological regions. The company is listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) under the ticker symbol TMR.
